name: @bb84/quailbot-pi
description: Quailbot Pi -- a Pi agent extension that turns a quantum instrument workspace into a measurement-readback action loop, with experiment logging and a workspace calibrator.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck:browser && node scripts/build-workspace-ui-client.mjs
scripts.pi: npm run dev:release && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:QUAILBOT_PI_STATE_DIR=\"$PWD\.quailbot-pi\"; npm exec -- pi --session-dir .pi-state/sessions"
scripts.pi:mutating: npm run dev:release && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:QUAILBOT_PI_STATE_DIR=\"$PWD\.quailbot-pi\"; $env:QUAILBOT_ALLOW_MUTATING_TOOLS='1'; npm exec -- pi --session-dir .pi-state/sessions"
